zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Hardreshull於1320年之前出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，她的父親Sir John Hardreshull28歲，母親Margaret Stafford26歲。她於大約1335年與Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世在英國盧特藍德艾可頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Hardreshull于1320年之前出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Sir John Hardreshull28岁，母亲Margaret Stafford26岁。她于大约1335年与Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世在英国盧特藍德艾可頓。

variants.name: Dey

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Hardreshull was born before 1320, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Hardreshull, was 28 and her mother, Margaret Stafford, was 26. She married Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington about 1335. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 9 daughters. She died in Exton, Rutland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Hardreshull est née avant 1320, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Hardreshull, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stafford, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington environ 1335. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée à Exton, Rutland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Hardreshull vor 1320 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Hardreshull 28 und ihre Mutter Margaret Stafford 26. Sie hat um 1335 Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 9 Töchter. Sie starb in Exton, Rutland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Hardreshull è nata il prima del 1320 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Hardreshull, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Margaret Stafford, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington circa 1335. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 9 figlie. Morì nel Exton, Rutland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Hardreshullが1320年以前にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Hardreshullは28歳，母Margaret Staffordは26歳であった。約1335年にSir John de Brus Lord of Coningtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスルトランドエクストンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Hardreshull(이)가 1320년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Hardreshull(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Stafford(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1335년 Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 루틀랜드 스턴에서 사망했다.

mn.Saleby, Lincolnshire, England: Saleby, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Hardreshull nasceu antes 1320, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Hardreshull, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stafford, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington aproximadamente 1335. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Hardreshull родилась перед 1320 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Hardreshull было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stafford, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington около 1335 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 9 дочерей. Она умерла в местности экстон, рутланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Hardreshull nació antes de 1320, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Hardreshull, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Stafford, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington aproximadamente 1335. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 9 hijas. Murió en Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra.
